title: LETINE Soywax Tea Lights Candles Bulk 24 Pack, 4 Hour White Tea Lights Long Burning, Unscented Tealights for Wedding, Party Centerpieces Halloween Christmas
features: 4-Hour Premium Soy Wax Tea Lights: Made from soy wax, these clean-burning candles last up to 4 hours, creating a warm ambiance for weddings, parties, or cozy nights at home
Bulk 24-Pack Value Candles Bulk: Compact 3.8cm/1.5" diameter size fits all standard holders, these durable tea lights provide dependable 4-hour illumination with a stable 1.5/0.55" height flame.

100% Cotton Wicks Clean & Reusable: Prioritize health and sustainability! Long-lasting soy wax(paraffin-free), smokeless burn, and reusable materials make this 24-count set ideal for events or eco-aware households.
Gift Choice for Woman: Bring a touch of nature into your space with our Soy Tea Lights Candles 24 Pack. Enjoy the calming flicker of these candles in any room of your home.
Safty Packaging: Each tea light is housed in an individual aluminum shell, preventing shell melting and allowing you a safty using experience.
